level.setting: The decaying industrial sub-levels of Neo-Vancity, dripping with neon waste and tense with silent dread

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage power conduits spitting plasma arcs

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Modifies weapon payload to melt heavy composite plating

encounters.trigger: A sudden security lockdown seals the blast door, forcing the player to hack the terminal which alerts patrol units in the next sector.

encounters.hazard: Vats overflowing with pressurized toxic industrial sludge

pickup.name: EMP Shock Grenade
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency electromagnetic pulse to disable heavy shielding

encounters.trigger: The dying Enforcer triggers a self-destruct sequence, detonating the door to the flooded lower dock and waking a dormant security guardian.

encounters.hazard: Deep electrified water that drains player shields on contact

pickup.name: Overdrive Firmware Patch
pickup.effect: Permanently boosts Arc-Welder output to extreme frequencies

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Sentry Mech triggers a system-wide reboot that opens the mainframe chamber where the AI core awaits.

boss.name: The ARCHON Core AI
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Overdrive Firmware Patch into the main coolant vents to overload the core's cooling system while defending against security countermeasures.

level.objective: Infiltrate the underground server farm, bypass the rogue security network, and neutralize the corrupted ARCHON AI Core.
level.reward: The Master decryption key for Neo-Vancity's municipal power grid.

level.setting: The neon-drenched, chaotic slums of Sector 9, filled with malfunctioning advertising holo-screens, overflowing toxic waste conduits, and constant surveillance drone fire.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage power conduits arching wildly across the wet asphalt.

pickup.name: EMP Grenade Shard
pickup.effect: Disables active cybernetic shields on contact.

encounters.trigger: Hacking the disabled drone's neural link forces open the security gates leading into the abandoned cybernetics clinic.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured cryo-tanks leaking freezing vapor that slows player movement and drains health.

pickup.name: Overcharged Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Melts through heavy composite reinforced armor plates.

encounters.trigger: The cyber-psycho's death rattle activates a terminal that triggers a floor elevator, descending into the underground data-vault.

encounters.hazard: Automated floor-mounted laser grids sweeping back and forth continuously.

pickup.name: Holographic Decoy Matrix
pickup.effect: Creates a hard-light copy of the player to redirect targeting sensors.

encounters.trigger: Bypassing the heavy mech's core initiates a self-destruct cycle that blows open the blast doors to the Master Server Room.

boss.name: The Cyber-Chimera (Synthetic Security Behemoth)
boss.victory_condition: Deploy the Holographic Decoy Matrix to trick the Chimera into firing its plasma cannon at its own power generators, then execute a critical strike with the Mono-molecular Vibro-Kodachi.

level.objective: Infiltrate the secret corporate server vault, eliminate all active defenses, and retrieve the encrypted memory core containing the syndicate's master ledger.
level.reward: The legendary 'Wraith-Step' cybernetic leg implant, allowing the Shadowblade to phase through solid obstacles and physical attacks for a brief duration.

level.setting: The neon-slicked, abandoned research lab of MicroGen Corp in Neo-Seoul

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage copper wiring in the water

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Overdrive Cartridge
pickup.effect: Modifies weapon to freeze target circuitry instantly

encounters.trigger: A security log reveals a breach in the main ventilation shaft, unlocking the door to the venting sector

encounters.hazard: Superheated steam jets bursting periodically

pickup.name: Magnetic Resonance Disruptor
pickup.effect: Pulses electromagnetic waves that destabilize heavy shielding

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the crawler shuts down the fan blades, opening the path to the high-security vault

encounters.hazard: Intrusive security lasers sweep the floor grid

pickup.name: Decryption Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Accesses the restricted root directory terminal

encounters.trigger: The security mech's death explosion short-circuits the main server doors, releasing the central AI core

boss.name: A.E.G.I.S. Mainframe Core
boss.victory_condition: Inject the override keycard to trigger a factory reset on the mainframe before the countdown finishes

level.objective: Infiltrate the forgotten MicroGen lab, bypass its defenses, and extract the encrypted memory drive.
level.reward: The Prototype Blueprint for Nanite-Infused Armor

level.setting: An abandoned, rain-slicked cyber-mainframe sector under an ominous, perpetually neon-flickering sky.

encounters.hazard: Flickering Laser Barriers

pickup.name: Chronos Overcharge Cell
pickup.effect: Temporarily doubles Temporal Rift-Blade attack speed.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Chronos Overcharge Cell into the security terminal unlocks the heavy blast doors to the Data Hive, revealing a patrol of elite drones.

encounters.hazard: Overloading Power Cores

pickup.name: EMP Chrono-Grenade
pickup.effect: Instantly freezes all robotic components in a 10-meter radius.

encounters.trigger: Detonating the secondary generator to bypass the firewall triggers an emergency lockdown, trapping the player in the Core Sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Spilled Nanite Acid pools

pickup.name: De-fragmentation Matrix Key
pickup.effect: Bypasses quantum shields on digital constructs.

encounters.trigger: Using the De-fragmentation Matrix Key on the main server hub wakes the dormant sector overseer.

boss.name: Archon, the Time-Weaver Core
boss.victory_condition: Inject the De-fragmentation Matrix Key into the central cooling unit while Archon is in its recharge phase.

level.objective: Infiltrate the decaying mainframe sector, bypass the rogue automated defenses, and neutralize the corrupted Time-Weaver Core.
level.reward: The legendary Chrono-Siphon Core, unlocking advanced time-rewind capabilities for the player.

level.setting: The decaying, neon-drenched underbelly of an abandoned neural-cloning facility.

encounters.hazard: Leaking electric fluids dripping from overhead conduits.

pickup.name: Phosphor-Cyanide Catalyst
pickup.effect: Modifies elixir launcher to fire corrosive blue flames.

encounters.trigger: Securing the catalyst causes the blast doors to lock, rerouting power to the bioluminescent nursery.

encounters.hazard: Bursting embryonic pods releasing toxic nerve gas.

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Solution
pickup.effect: Modifies elixir launcher to instantly freeze cybernetic joints.

encounters.trigger: The death shriek of the Graft-Stalker overloads the sector's main mainframe, exposing the security core access tunnel.

encounters.hazard: Laser tripwires that trigger automated wall turrets.

pickup.name: Unstable Ionic Plasma Core
pickup.effect: Allows the launcher to fire high-voltage electromagnetic surges.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Exoguard drops the electromagnetic shielding to the mainframe mainframe, releasing the AI construct.

boss.name: The Recombined Mind-Mesh AI
boss.victory_condition: Overload the central neural node using the Unstable Ionic Plasma Core to fry the AI's core processor.

level.objective: Navigate the eerie ruins of the clone facility, upgrade your chemical weaponry, and purge the corrupted AI mainframe.
level.reward: The Codex of Forbidden Nanotech and a legendary level upgrade module.

level.setting: The decaying underbelly of Sector 9, an abandoned cybernetic waste reclamation facility shrouded in toxic smog and neon-flicker shadows.

encounters.hazard: Corrosive coolant steam vents erupting from rusted pipes.

pickup.name: EMP Shock-Charge
pickup.effect: Disables active electronic shields and stuns mechanical targets.

encounters.trigger: A hardwired console overrides the security gate, opening the way into the Overheated Conduit.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage power conduits arc electricity across the floor.

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced plating, exposing vulnerable internal wiring.

encounters.trigger: The explosion of the Heavy Sentry Mech breaches the floor plates, forcing the player to drop into the Flooded Ventilation Shaft.

encounters.hazard: Knee-deep toxic sludge that slows movement speed by 50% and inflicts gradual damage.

pickup.name: Overcharged Core Overdrive
pickup.effect: Triples the vibrational frequency of the Vibro-Blade for a short duration.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the ventilation fan reveals a direct elevator shaft descending into the Master Frame Vault.

boss.name: A.E.G.I.S. Command Core
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Core's outer crystalline memory matrix while enhanced by the Overcharged Core Overdrive to initiate a system meltdown.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate ruins of Sector 9 to infiltrate the Master Frame Vault and neutralize the rogue A.E.G.I.S. Command Core before it broadcasts a fatal override signal to the city's network.
level.reward: The legendary 'Shadow-Step' active optical camouflage module and 15,000 corporate credits.

level.setting: The Neon Cloud District, a whimsical sky-city run by runaway helper droids

encounters.hazard: Slippery spill of pink synthetic syrup

pickup.name: Glow-sticky Bubblegum
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and can gum up electrical gears

encounters.trigger: A short circuit in a nearby giant soda dispenser reveals a hidden access hatch to the Delivery Tubes.

encounters.hazard: Sudden bursts of high-velocity confetti streams

pickup.name: Static-charging Copper Ribbon
pickup.effect: Boosts next storm attack by 20 damage

encounters.trigger: A pneumatic cargo lift activates automatically, sending the player upward into the Cloud Maintenance Hub.

encounters.hazard: Over-enthusiastic floor polishing rollers

pickup.name: Overcharged Capacitor Battery
pickup.effect: Infuses the player with maximum kinetic electrical energy

encounters.trigger: The mech's defeat triggers a celebratory laser show that opens the main dome doors leading to the Core Generator.

boss.name: DJ Sparkle-Byte, the Rogue Sound-System
boss.victory_condition: Plug the Overcharged Capacitor Battery into the DJ booth to overcharge the sound system with beautiful, harmless rainbow lightning.

level.objective: De-escalate the wild runaway techno-party by safely neutralizing the malfunctioning DJ robot.
level.reward: The Master-Key Vinyl Record and the title of Honorary Party Stormcaller

level.setting: An abandoned, neon-lit rooftop greenhouse surrounded by silent skyscrapers and falling digital rain.

encounters.hazard: Slick, wet solar panel tiles with high-voltage currents pulsing through them.

pickup.name: Crystalline Shard
pickup.effect: Enhances the player weapon to channel seismic reverberations.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Crystalline Shard into the central terminal unlocks the heavy blast doors leading to the hydroponics wing.

encounters.hazard: Leaking bio-luminescent nutrient fluid that slows movement and numbs senses.

pickup.name: Ferrofluid Ampoule
pickup.effect: Allows the user to manipulate and solidify liquid metal structures.

encounters.trigger: Pouring the Ferrofluid Ampoule onto the structural fractures of the bridge stabilizes the path to the high-rise atrium.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent holographic projections that obscure vision and scramble targeting sensors.

pickup.name: Seismic Resonator Core
pickup.effect: Channels high-frequency subterranean vibrations directly through metal conduits.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Seismic Resonator Core into the ventilation shaft activates the elevator to the penthouse helipad.

boss.name: The Cybernetic Arbor-Mind
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core's sensory matrix using the Seismic Resonator Core to shatter its mainframe without destroying the surrounding sanctuary.

level.objective: Soothe the corrupted AI controlling the rooftop sanctuary to restore ecological balance to the lower districts.
level.reward: The Master Geomantic Aegis and safe passage to the corporate mainframe.

encounters.hazard: Sinking toxic sludge pools

pickup.name: Vial of Liquid Sol
pickup.effect: Adds temporary radiant damage to spells

encounters.trigger: Placing the Ghoul's skull on the altar of light unseals the iron gates to the torture chamber.

encounters.hazard: Swinging rusted pendulum blades

pickup.name: Brimstone Talisman
pickup.effect: Amplifies fire damage by fifty percent for one spell

encounters.trigger: Burning the Shadow Creeper's remnants ignites the braziers that melt the ice blocking the lower pit.

encounters.hazard: Falling overhead icicles triggered by sound

pickup.name: Heart of Ash
pickup.effect: Absorbs necrotic energy and converts it into health

encounters.trigger: Shattering the core of the Glacial Construct crumbles the grand sepulcher door, revealing the boss chamber.

boss.name: Malakor, The Undying Lich
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Heart of Ash to siphon Malakor's soul shield, then incinerate his physical form.

level.objective: Purge the dark presence corrupting the Whispering Catacombs and reclaim the crown of embers.
level.reward: Crown of Embers and the Pyromancer's Regalia

encounters.hazard: Sneezewort Pollen Clouds

pickup.name: Glowing Pixie Nectar
pickup.effect: Soothes angry creatures and restores 20 health

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bee clears the pollen path, revealing the Glittering Creek crossing.

encounters.hazard: Slippery Mossy Stepping Stones

pickup.name: Resonant Chime Shell
pickup.effect: Amplifies musical vibrations in the air

encounters.trigger: The bullfrog leaps away, knocking over a hollow log that forms a bridge to the Hollow Oak.

encounters.hazard: Falling Acorn Showers

pickup.name: Soporific Golden Seed
pickup.effect: Induces instant deep slumber in giant beasts

encounters.trigger: The badger scampers into the roots, unlocking the hidden trapdoor to the ancient badger king's court.

boss.name: Barnaby the Overfed Badger King
boss.victory_condition: Feed the Soporific Golden Seed to Barnaby to put him to sleep and play a lullaby on the Enchanted Bramble Flute.

level.objective: Lull the restless Badger King to sleep to reclaim the stolen Meadow Crown.
level.reward: The Meadow Crown and the eternal friendship of the forest beasts.

level.setting: The Desecrated Sepulcher of the Sun King

encounters.hazard: Toxic Miasma Vents

pickup.name: Vial of Luminescent Holy Water
pickup.effect: Deals high radiant damage and purifies necrotic barriers

encounters.trigger: Placing the Ghoul's heart on the altar opens the iron gate to the Catacombs of the Weeping Saints.

encounters.hazard: Sinking Tar Pit

pickup.name: Amulet of Solar Radiance
pickup.effect: Emits a pulse of blinding sunlight that stuns undead and shatters crystalline armor

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Shadow Creeper ignites the wall torches, illuminating a hidden path to the Inner Sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Falling Stalactites

pickup.name: Shield of the Dawnbringer
pickup.effect: Reflects projectile attacks and grants temporary invulnerability when charged with solar energy

encounters.trigger: The Golem's collapse crumbles the chamber floor, dropping the player into the Throne of the Damned for the final battle.

boss.name: Malakor the Undying King
boss.victory_condition: Reflect Malakor's Dark Fireball using the Shield of the Dawnbringer to stun him, then strike his exposed core with the Consecrated Greatsword.

level.objective: Purge the corruption from the Sun King's tomb and reclaim the relic of light.
level.reward: The Crown of Dawn and the Holy Paladin Title

level.setting: The Weeping Labyrinth of Mirrors, a shifting maze made of crystalline glass reflections and violet mist.

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor plates that trigger piercing glass shards.

pickup.name: Prism of True Sight
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible paths and bypasses illusion-based defenses.

encounters.trigger: Placing the Prism of True Sight onto the pedestal opens the pathway to the Whispering Cloister.

encounters.hazard: Dense violet miasma that slowly drains player health over time.

pickup.name: Phantasmal Echo Bell
pickup.effect: Emits a sonic resonance that shatters solid crystalline structures.

encounters.trigger: Ringing the Phantasmal Echo Bell shatters the giant crystal wall blocking access to the Sunken Echo Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Falling stalactites of razor-sharp quartz triggered by high-pitched noises.

pickup.name: Vial of Luminescent Essence
pickup.effect: Dispels absolute magical darkness and blinds shadowy entities.

encounters.trigger: Pouring the Vial of Luminescent Essence into the central basin illuminates the path to the Heart of Reflections where the boss awaits.

boss.name: The Mirage Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Blind the Mirage Sovereign's shadow clones using the Vial of Luminescent Essence, exposing its real core for a final blow with the Phantasm Staff of Mirroring.

level.objective: Navigate the treacherous, illusion-filled labyrinth and destroy the core of the Mirage Sovereign to reclaim the stolen memories of the High Archmage.
level.reward: The Sovereign's Diadem, granting permanent stealth casting and immunity to illusion spells.

level.setting: The Whispering Birch Grove, a sun-dappled woodland filled with drifting pollen and calming streams

encounters.hazard: Slippery wet river rocks

pickup.name: Flask of Sun-Dew Honey
pickup.effect: Heals 30 health and infuses the player's weapon with warm light

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the ancient stone gate at the riverbank opens the path to the Sunlit Clearing.

encounters.hazard: Drifting patches of sleep-inducing pollen

pickup.name: Shimmering Moon-Lily Blossom
pickup.effect: Creates a protective barrier and emits a soft, purifying fragrance

encounters.trigger: Dispersing the shadow mist allows the player to cross the bridge into the Weeping Willow Sanctuary.

encounters.hazard: Entangling roots that slow movement speed

pickup.name: Resonant Bell-Flower Seed
pickup.effect: Emits a pure, high-frequency sound wave when struck

encounters.trigger: Soothe the weeping tree's spirit to reveal the hidden archway leading to the Heart of the Grove.

boss.name: Aethelgard, the Sleep-Addled Elder Ent
boss.victory_condition: Strike the Resonant Bell-Flower Seed to wake the Ent from his nightmare-induced slumber, restoring his peaceful state.

level.objective: Gently wake the ancient guardian Ent to restore perfect harmony to the Whispering Birch Grove.
level.reward: The Warden's Emblem of Peace and the passive ability 'Serene Aura', which pacifies wild beasts automatically.

level.setting: The Molten Crucible of the Blood-Mad God

encounters.hazard: Erupting sulfur vents that spray burning acid on a random timer

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Rune
pickup.effect: Enchants weapon attacks with a freezing aura for the next combat

encounters.trigger: A massive tectonic tremor collapses the cavern wall, forcing the player down into the Magma Sewers.

encounters.hazard: Rising tide of hyper-heated sludge that limits safe standing ground

pickup.name: Aegis of the Fallen Warden
pickup.effect: Surrounds the player with a kinetic shield that absorbs fire damage

encounters.trigger: The elemental's death rattle shatters the iron sluice gates, washing the player into the Searing Arena.

encounters.hazard: Spiraling fire tornados that bounce randomly off the arena walls

pickup.name: Vial of Abyssal Quicksilver
pickup.effect: Shatters on impact to temporarily douse ancient, corrupted fires

encounters.trigger: The juggernaut crashes into the grand pillars, causing the ceiling to cave in and dropping the player into the inner sanctum of the boss.

boss.name: Kragthor the Ever-Burning
boss.victory_condition: Shatter Kragthor's obsidian heart by dousing his core with the Vial of Abyssal Quicksilver and executing a heavy strike with the Serrated Greataxe

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing, fire-torn cavern, slay the raging elemental guardians, and extinguish Kragthor the Ever-Burning to claim his fiery heart.
level.reward: The Core of Everlasting Flame, granting permanent fire immunity and unleashing chaotic magma waves when attacking

level.setting: The Whispering Catacombs beneath the Forgotten Cathedral

encounters.location: The Crypt of the Weeping Monks
encounters.hazard: Toxic rot gas venting from broken sarcophagi

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Water
pickup.effect: Purifies toxic hazards and inflicts fire damage to undead

encounters.trigger: Placing the skull of the Ghoul on the altar opens the iron gate to the Ossuary.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the crumbling bone ceiling

pickup.name: Grave Dust Censer
pickup.effect: Creates a smoke screen that blinds constructs and shadows

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Warden's runic shield unlocks the doorway to the Sunken Mausoleum.

encounters.hazard: Slippery, deep black slime pool covering the floor

pickup.name: Amulet of the Gravekeeper
pickup.effect: Absorbs necrotic energy and shatters ancient spectral shields

encounters.trigger: Dispelling the Shadow Creeper's core breaks the barrier leading into the Sanctum of the Arch-Lich.

boss.name: Arch-Lich Malakar
boss.victory_condition: Reflect Malakar's Death Bolt using the Amulet of the Gravekeeper and strike him with the Scythe of Souls.

level.objective: Retrieve the Skull of the First Necromancer from the depths of the catacombs.
level.reward: The Spellbook of eternal reanimation and access to the Necropolis tier of magic.

level.setting: The Whispering Fens, a desolate and decaying wasteland of petrified trees and toxic fog

encounters.hazard: Corrosive sap dripping from dead branches

pickup.name: Phosphor-coated Broadhead
pickup.effect: Increases arrow damage and illuminates dark crevices

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Crawler collapses the rotten roots beneath you, dropping you into the Submerged Catacombs

encounters.hazard: Rising water levels that restrict movement speed

pickup.name: Vial of Pure Sun-distillate
pickup.effect: Imbues the next strike with searing solar energy

encounters.trigger: The Drowned's death rattle shatters a stone seal, opening a flooded passage to the central Altar

encounters.hazard: Sudden bursts of freezing specter-mist

pickup.name: Quiver of the Silver Dawn
pickup.effect: Arrows bypass supernatural armor and dispel shadow magic

encounters.trigger: The vanishing Wraith releases a surge of energy that activates the ancient lift leading to the canopy of the World Oak

boss.name: The Rot-Heart Avatar
boss.victory_condition: Shoot the glowing rot-core in the beast's chest with a Silver Dawn arrow when it exposes its ribcage

level.objective: Navigate the desolate ruins of the fens, cleanse the corrupted guardians, and purify the Rot-Heart Avatar at the peak of the World Oak.
level.reward: The Seed of Rebirth, restoring vitality to the dying wilderness and unlocking the Ranger's Master Huntsman subclass.
